title: Watch: Joe Biden struggles to find stage exit after speech targeting Donald Trump
summary_full: Former President Joe Biden delivered a strong speech attacking Donald Trump at a Maryland summit, criticizing his policies and calling them "vanity projects" and corrupt. The 83-year-old, who relied on a teleprompter and coughed during his remarks, also appeared to briefly search for the correct exit from the stage. This follows another recent on-stage moment where he seemed disoriented.
